lines: Nyenyeri yo mu museke, U bonets' uri kw ijuru,Ur' umucy' utuvira. Tumurikir' imitima, Utweyurir'mwijima Ukunda kuba mw isi.
Mwami, Mwana—w'Uwiteka, Muri Wowe,—har’ umucyo: Jy udushorera, Mukiza.
Ni Wowe, Yesu, wanshatse Mu mwijima wa Satani,Ubwo nari muri wo, Wowe,
Mucunguzi wanjye, Wankuye mu bwenge buke Kubw' urukundo rwawe.
Wiyambuy' icyubahiro, Wigira nk'umugaragu Utagir' agaciro. Uhorw' ibyaha
nakoze, Mpeshw' amahoro n'ubuntu N'urupfu rwawe, Yesu.
Mucunguzi, mbane nawe, Njye nkwizeran’umurava :Uz' intege nke zanjye; Njye
nkor’ iby' ushaka byose. Non' unshunshumurireho Umwuka wawe Wera.
